<!--
The PR title becomes the squash-merge commit on main.
Write it as a Conventional Commit, e.g. "feat(search): add tag filters".
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build` passes
- [ ] A changeset was added (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects users
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed
